title: PlayerProfiles
description: Show customizable player's profiles with GUI by right-clicking them
body:
# Player Profiles
Player Profiles is a plugin to show a player's profiles in a very modern way, you can show player armor, main hand/off hand, or maybe the whole player's inventory if you want and create custom GUIs as many as you want.

# Features
- [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) support
- [CombatLogX](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/combatlogx.31689/) support
- Create Unlimited Custom GUI
- Custom Head Support (base64, textures, player)
- Show specific slots of the player's inventory
- Custom Model Data support
- Create Unlimited Items
- Lock/Unlock Profiles
- Extremely Lightweight
- Highly Customizable

# Commands
> <> = Required
> [] = Optional
- /playerprofiles - Show help messages.
- /playerprofiles toggle - Lock/Unlock your profile.
- /playerprofiles reload - Reload the configuration.
- /playerprofiles opengui <player> <target> <menu> - Open a custom gui.
- /playerprofiles listgui - Show list of custom gui.
- /playerprofiles openprofile <target> <player> - Open player profile
- /profile - Open your own profile.

# Permissions
- playerprofiles.admin
- playerprofiles.toggle
- playerprofiles.profile
- playerprofiles.profile.others
- playerprofiles.viewinteract
- playerprofiles.bypass.world
- playerprofiles.bypass.combat
- playerprofiles.bypass.blocked
- playerprofiles.bypass.cooldown

# See the plugin in action
![Player Profiles Plugin in Action Video Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/jnPfnJvTIwmLpCSiPJ/giphy.gif)

# Lock/Unlock Your Profile (Old Video)
![Player Profiles Lock and Unlock Profile Video Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/h86adPJTaKSLB7Mi6a/giphy.gif)

# Permission Items
The two images showcase the different when you open a profile with and without specific permission to view certain items.
![Player Profiles Permission Items Image Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/E8dmpK9.png 'With Permission')
![Player Profiles Permission Items Image Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/jhY4Bl3.png 'Without Permission')

# Create your own Custom GUI and use it anywhere
![Player Profiles Custom GUI Video Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/wzloo4eIvpjHtvkVm0/giphy.gif)

# Only Owner Items
The items that have only owner option toggled on can only be viewed by the owner of the profile.
![Player Profiles Only Owner Items Video Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/nRqeOYHkSIpls9M9mJ/giphy.gif)

# Only Visitor Items
These items can only be viewed by the visitor of the profile.
![Player Profiles Only Visitor Items Video Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/6BDxv6SiqKBhCUH4Hi/giphy.gif)

# Check Distance Feature
If both players are far from each other, the profile will automatically closed, this feature is great if you want to only enable players from viewing each other's profile in close distance.
![Player Profiles Check Distance Feature Video Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/eX4GnRFbiC2T5eVgIj/giphy.gif)

# Statistics
![Player Profiles Plugin Usage Statistics](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/PlayerInformation.svg)
